why: Store vault metadata for future operations
output: Persisted vault configuration record with generated vault ID

success_handling.criteria: Database write completes and vault record is retrievable by ID

error_handling.criteria: SQLite write operation throws an error (SQLITE_BUSY, SQLITE_CORRUPT, etc.)
error_handling.action: Abort registration, clean up cloned repository

event.message: Failed to write vault configuration to database: {error}

error_handling.criteria: Database unique constraint violation on vault name
error_handling.action: Return error suggesting user choose a different name or update existing vault

decisions.outcome: Abort registration, prompt user to rename or update
Abort registration, clean up cloned repo
